random.cdisc.data 0.1.0
  • Reference

Time To Event Dataset

aqs.Rd

Time To Event Dataset

aqs(ADSL, FUN = function(p) {     PARAMCD <- c("BFIALL", "FATIGI", "FKSI-FWB",
  "FKSI-TSE", "FKSIALL")     PARAM <- c("BFI All Questions",
  "Fatigue Interference", "Function/Well-Being (GF1,GF3,GF7)",
  "Treatment Side Effects (GP2,C5,GP5)", "FKSI-19 All Questions")     nvisits <-
  ceiling(runif(1) * 10 + 1)     data.frame(USUBJID = p$USUBJID, STUDYID =
  p$STUDYID, PARAMCD = rep(PARAMCD, each = nvisits), PARAM = rep(PARAM, each =
  nvisits), AVAL = rnorm(length(PARAM) * nvisits), AVISIT = paste("WEEK",
  1:nvisits), AVISITN = rep(1:nvisits, length(PARAM)), ABLFL = rep(rep(c("Y",
  ""), c(1, nvisits - 1)), length(PARAM)), APBFL = rep(rep(c("", "Y"), c(1,
  nvisits - 1)), length(PARAM)), stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% mutate(CHG =
  AVAL - AVAL[1], PCHG = CHG/AVAL[1]) }, ..., start_with)

Examples


radam("AQS")
#>      USUBJID STUDYID  PARAMCD                               PARAM          AVAL
